basic_details.job_title: MoEF&CC Scientific Consultant Grade I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Environment Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC)
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Environment Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC) Scientific Consultant Grade-I (Finance/Economics) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of MoEF&CC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MoEF&CC Scientific Consultant Grade-I (Finance/Economics) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 40 years as on the date of publication of the vacancy notice. Age relaxation applicable to eligible categories as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: Master's Degree in Economics/ Finance. Desirable: M.Phil./Ph.D. in Economics/Finance and experience in Climate Finance. Minimum five (05) years and up to ten (10) years of professional experience in economic or financial analysis, preferably related to climate finance, public finance, environmental economics, or policy analysis.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MoEF&CC Scientific Consultant Grade-I post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Scientific Consultant Grade-I (Finance/Economics) position is 12th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Economics or Finance. A Master of Philosophy (M.Phil.) or Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in the same fields is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years as of the date of the vacancy notice publication. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Consultant Grade-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 90,000 per month for this contractual role.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Scientific Consultant Grade-I (Finance/Economics) in the Ministry of Environment Forest and Climate Change.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post to the designated address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required professional experience?
faq.answer: A minimum of five years and up to ten years of professional experience in economic or financial analysis is required. Preference will be given to experience in climate finance, public finance, or policy analysis.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent by post to: Assistant Director (Ms. Swathi Senan), Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, 3rd Level Vayu Wing, Jor Bagh Road, New Delhi - 110003.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What details should be superscribed on the envelope?
faq.answer: The envelope should be superscribed with 'Application for the post of Scientific Consultant Grade-I (Finance/Economics), Climate Change Division, MoEF&CC'.
